name: Zhejiang Rongsheng Environmental Protection Paper Joint Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Rongsheng Environmental Protection Paper Joint Stock Co., Ltd. produces and sells recycled paper products in China. The company offers kraft cardboard paper, corrugated base paper, corrugated cardboard, and kraft board paper, as well as packaging products. It also produces steam. The company exports its products. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Pinghu, China.
